mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_summary_expenses (project_id, rental_cost, supplies_cost, parking_cost, compensation_cost, service_cost, travel_misc_cost, travel_misc_days) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{rentalCost}, #{suppliesCost}, #{parkingCost}, #{compensationCost}, #{serviceCost}, #{travelMiscCost}, #{travelMiscDays})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_summary_expenses WHERE project_id = #{projectId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE project_summary_expenses SET rental_cost = #{rentalCost}, supplies_cost = #{suppliesCost}, parking_cost = #{parkingCost}, compensation_cost = #{compensationCost}, service_cost = #{serviceCost}, travel_misc_cost = #{travelMiscCost}, travel_misc_days = #{travelMiscDays} WHERE id = #{id}
